name: rct-online-multiplayer
description: OpenPark — a co-op isometric theme-park tycoon (RCT-Deluxe-style) with peer-to-peer multiplayer.
author: Evan Greenfield

scripts.dev: concurrently -n srv,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p shared --noEmit && tsc -p server --noEmit && tsc -p client --noEmit
scripts.exportGame: npm run build -w client && electron-builder --win portable
